description: Named product-value scenarios for replayable PECR usefulness checks.

scenarios.title: Customer status and plan lookup
scenarios.job: Verify the current customer status and plan tier from safeview data.
scenarios.query: What is the customer status and plan tier?

scenarios.title: Support policy source citation
scenarios.job: Quote the support policy directly from source text with corroborating evidence.
scenarios.query: Show the source text and evidence for the support policy

scenarios.title: Latest support document change review
scenarios.job: Explain what changed in the newest version of the support document.
scenarios.query: What changed in the latest version of the support document?

scenarios.title: Annual refund source lookup
scenarios.job: Find the exact annual refund language in source text.
scenarios.query: Show the source text for annual refund terms

scenarios.title: Billing terms evidence lookup
scenarios.job: Return evidence for the billing terms policy without guessing.
scenarios.query: Show evidence for the billing terms policy

scenarios.title: Customer counts by plan tier
scenarios.job: Compare active customer counts by plan tier using structured aggregation.
scenarios.query: Compare active customer counts by plan tier

scenarios.title: Monthly customer trend
scenarios.job: Summarize the customer trend over time without falling back to raw source search.
scenarios.query: Show monthly customer trend over time

scenarios.title: Broad customer query narrowing
scenarios.job: Offer a safe narrowing hint instead of a dead-end answer for an over-broad structured request.

scenarios.title: Broad policy query narrowing
scenarios.job: Offer a document-scoped narrowing hint for a broad evidence request instead of failing flatly.

scenarios.title: Partial billing answer with unresolved remainder
scenarios.job: Return grounded billing terms while clearly flagging unresolved refund exceptions.
scenarios.query: Summarize the billing terms and any unresolved refund exceptions
